executives.name: Mark Chalmers
executives.background: Mr. Chalmers has served as the President and Chief Executive Officer of Energy Fuels since February 1, 2018. Prior to that, he served as the Chief Operating Officer of the Company from July 1, 2016 to January 31, 2018. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, specifically in uranium and base metals.

executives.name: Tom Boron
executives.background: Mr. Boron has served as the Chief Financial Officer of Energy Fuels since May 2023. He has over 30 years of financial and accounting experience in the mining and natural resources sectors.

executives.name: David Frydenlund
executives.background: Mr. Frydenlund has served as the Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary of Energy Fuels since 2012. He has been with the Company and its predecessors since 1997.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Curtis Moore
executives.background: Mr. Moore has served as the Senior Vice President of Marketing and Corporate Development since 2012. He is responsible for uranium and vanadium sales and marketing.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President of Marketing and Corporate Development

board_of_directors.name: Birks Bovaird
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Bovaird is the Chairman of the Board. He has been a director of the Company since 2006. He has extensive experience in corporate finance and the resource industry.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Chalmers
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Energy Fuels Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Barbara Filas
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Filas is a mining engineer with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive leadership and technical roles.

board_of_directors.name: Ben Fine
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Fine has extensive experience in the uranium industry and corporate finance.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Kirkwood
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kirkwood has over 35 years of experience in the mining and energy industries.

board_of_directors.name: Alex Morrison
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Morrison is a CPA with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Ivy Estabrooke
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Estabrooke has a background in science and technology policy and innovation.
